panel.label: Extra Ring Slots
config.extraRingSlots.name: Extra Ring Slots
config.extraRingSlots.description: How many extra ring slots to add (in addition to the 2 vanilla slots).
config.infiniteCombining.name: Infinite Ring Combining
config.infiniteCombining.description: Remove the cap on how many rings can be combined together.
config.AddCombinedDuplicateRingCap.name: Add Combined Duplicate Ring Cap
config.AddCombinedDuplicateRingCap.descr: Prevent the same ring from being combined into the same Combined Ring multiple times.  Only takes effect when 'Infinite Ring Combining' is enabled.
config.WeaponForgingCap.name: Weapon Forging Cap
config.WeaponForgingCap.description: Maximum number of gem forges per weapon. 'Unlimited' removes the cap entirely; 'None (0)' prevents all forging.
config.RemoveDiamondForgesCap.name: Remove Diamond Forges Cap
config.RemoveDiamondForgesCap.descriptio: Remove the cap on how many diamond forges can be used (lets you keep using diamond forges beyond level 3).
config.multipleEnchantments.name: Multiple Enchantments
config.multipleEnchantments.description: Allow stacking multiple enchantments on the same weapon or tool instead of replacing the existing enchantment.
config.DragonToothStacking.name: Dragon Tooth Stacking
config.DragonToothStacking.description: Dragon Tooth adds the innate enchantment on top of existing ones instead of replacing them. Forging the same type again levels it up, capped at the game's per-type maximum.
config.AlwaysMaxDragonToothStat.name: Always Max Dragon Tooth Stat
config.AlwaysMaxDragonToothStat.descript: Innate enchantments applied by Dragon Tooth always land at their maximum level instead of a rolled level, and each Dragon Tooth craft also raises the innate enchantments already on the weapon to their caps. The cap can exceed what random rolls reach (e.g. Crit. Power V vs rolled max III).
config.ForgeMenuChoiceIntegration.name: Forge Menu Choice Integration
config.ForgeMenuChoiceIntegration.descri: When the 'Pick Your Enchantment' (Forge Menu Choice) mod is installed, its selection carousel also opens for Dragon Tooth crafts this mod handles (Galaxy/Infinity weapons, and all weapons when Dragon Tooth Stacking is on).
config.verbose.logging.name: Verbose Logging
config.verbose.logging.description: Log per-event debug messages ([Test]/[Forge] traces). The per-second ring/stat snapshot has its own toggle below.
config.VerboseTickSnapshot.name: Ring/Stat Tick Snapshot
config.VerboseTickSnapshot.description: Log the per-second '[Tick]' snapshot of equipped rings and buff stats. Very noisy — enable only when debugging ring effects. Independent of Verbose Logging.
config.uninstall.safety.paragraph: Rings stored in extra slots live in this mod's save data.  Before you uninstall the mod, click the button below to return them all to your inventory (or drop them at your feet if it's full).
config.uninstall.safety.button.tooltip: Toggling this returns every ring in your extra slots to your inventory.  Toggle and apply.
